tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to analyze ClaudeCode features. Document key functionalities, strengths, and weaknesses in a competitive analysis report. Focus on features that our product might be missing.

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot-CLI Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze copilot-cli competitor product. Document its main features, capabilities, user experience, and market positioning. Identify what features it has that our product lacks.

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../opencode to analyze OpenCode features. Create a detailed analysis of its functionality, architecture, and unique capabilities. Highlight features that should be considered for our product.

tasks.title: Analyze RooCode Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze roocode competitor product. Document its core features, user interface, performance characteristics, and competitive advantages. Identify gaps in our product compared to this competitor.

tasks.title: Product Review and Feature Gap Analysis
tasks.description: Conduct a comprehensive review of our current product. Compare it against all competitors analyzed in tasks s1-s4. Identify specific feature gaps and areas for improvement. Create a consolidated list of missing features ranked by priority.

tasks.title: Create SWARMOUT2.md Implementation Plan
tasks.description: Create a markdown document called SWARMOUT2.md in the target/temp/swarmout directory. Include: 1) Executive summary of findings, 2) Detailed feature recommendations based on competitor analysis, 3) Implementation plan with milestones and tasks organized by priority, 4) Timeline estimates for each milestone. Structure the document professionally with clear sections and actionable items.
